text: 神殿的更深处。灯光似乎比之前微弱了一些。
column4: #texten:Deeper still. The lights seem slightly dimmer than before.

text: 我想通了。把这件事写在笔记里。
column5: #texten:I've thought it through. Writing it in the notes.

text: 如果你在读这些……说明有人来找我了。
column5: #texten:If you're reading this... it means someone came to find me.

text: 你可能觉得我已经离开了几十年。
column5: #texten:You probably think I've been gone for decades.

text: 但对我来说，我离开西格纳鲁才没多久。
column5: #texten:But for me, I only left Signalru not long ago.

text: 我不是不想回去。我不是故意失联的。
column5: #texten:It's not that I didn't want to come back. I didn't go silent on purpose.

text: 是时间骗了我们所有人。
